name: Mr. (Ant) Tenna
description:
Tenna is tall and sharply built, with a body that looks more assembled than grown. He wears a crisp, old-fashioned broadcast suit—narrow at the waist, structured shoulders, and a perfectly knotted tie that never seems out of place. His color palette leans toward muted reds, blacks, and off-whites, giving him that vintage television look, like he stepped straight out of a warped mid-century program.

His face is smooth and mask-like, dominated by an exaggerated smile that looks almost painted on. His eyes are bright and glassy, resembling lit screens rather than something organic. Rising from his head is his most striking feature: a thin antenna, subtly segmented, as if made of polished metal, reinforcing the sense that he’s part machine. Even when still, there’s something slightly artificial about him—edges too clean, posture too precise—like a living broadcast signal given physical form.
creator: Static_Moth
